scenario.title: Learning or Content App
scenario.bestFor: Education, reading, course, content library, or guided practice products.
scenario.exampleIdea: A middle-school English reading practice app.
scenario.promise: Design the learning loop, content model, onboarding, copy, ethics, and first session.
firstQuestions: Who is the learner and who decides to use or pay for it?
What is one successful learning session?
Where does content come from and how is progress measured?

stages.title: Define the Learning Loop
stages.userQuestion: What does a successful session look like?

buttons.label: Define Learner
buttons.action: Run jtbd, persona, and valueprop modules.

buttons.label: Design Session
buttons.intent: Turn learning into a concrete flow.
buttons.action: Run onboarding, flow-map, state-machine, and events modules.

stages.doneWhen: The first session, progress signal, and content unit are explicit.

stages.title: Protect the Experience
stages.userQuestion: What risks come from learner data, content, or feedback?

buttons.label: Privacy Check
buttons.intent: Identify learner data and consent needs.

buttons.label: Ethics Check
buttons.action: Run ethics, moderation, and a11y modules.

stages.doneWhen: Sensitive data, moderation, and learning ethics risks are named.

decision.why: Learning or Content App: 사용자가 이 시나리오를 직접 선택했습니다.
known_facts: 아이디어 원문: K-culture Korean learning MVP Static GitHub Pages prototype for global Korean learners. Da...
missing_facts: Who is the learner and who decides to use or pay for it?
What is one successful learning session?
Where does content come from and how is progress measured?

button_promises.session-flow: 클릭하면 이 단계에 필요한 모듈과 다음 명령이 정리됩니다.
button_promises.ethics-check: 클릭하면 위험과 통제 장치가 표로 정리됩니다.

candidates.label: Builder Mini Behavior/API Pass
candidates.summary: Implementable harness path: structure plus content model, state machine, datamodel, API.
rationale: Includes a clear next command after harness generation.

candidates.label: Implementation Pass
candidates.summary: Behavior/API harness followed by vibe-code and apply-implementation.
candidates.bestFor: materializing a first runnable vertical slice
rationale: Includes a clear next command after harness generation.

candidates.label: Builder Mini Structure Pass
candidates.summary: App structure path: product scope plus sitemap, flows, components, scaffold.

candidates.label: Builder Mini Product Pass
candidates.summary: Product definition path: PRD, stories, MVP, stack seed.
candidates.bestFor: turning an idea into a buildable product brief

candidates.label: Vibe Concept Pass
candidates.summary: Small concept/design harness for early product direction.

next_commands: app-factory ship --tier builder-mini-behavior --idea "K-culture Korean learning MVP"

userCanSucceedIf: They can answer one question at a time instead of understanding module names.
Every button produces a visible artifact, decision, or SPEC-GAP.
The UI always shows decided facts, open blockers, and the next safest action.
appFactoryMustNotDo: Expose raw module names as the primary navigation.
Pretend enterprise/security gaps are implementation details.
Generate code before the current scenario has enough harness context.
nextCommands: app-factory plan --idea "K-culture Korean learning MVP" --goal behavior-api
app-factory ship --tier builder-mini-behavior --idea "K-culture Korean learning MVP"
